reviews.comment:
MUY BUENA ATENCION, MUY AMABLES Y SIMPATICOS LOS EMPLEADOS, BUENOS PRECIOS EN EL BAR, BAÑOS LIMPIOS Y EN CONDICIONES. Y LOS SANDWICHS DE MILANESA SON UNA MARAVILLA, HACEN HONOR A LA FAMA DE LOS SANDWICHS TUCUMANOS :). VALE LA PENA HACER UN ALTO EN EL CAMINO Y COMER ALGO ALLI.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, very friendly and kind employees, good prices at the bar, clean and tidy bathrooms. And the Milanese sandwiches are wonderful; they live up to the reputation of Tucuman sandwiches :). It's worth stopping along the way and having something to eat there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10320861675248100239/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnOHQyYmtRRRAB
